title: E-Commerce Platform for Local Brand
description: Full-stack e-commerce solution with payment gateway integration, inventory management, and admin dashboard. Built with React + Node.js.

title: School Management System
description: Complete school management software with student records, attendance, fee management, and parent portal. Django + PostgreSQL.

title: Real Estate Listing Website
description: Property listing platform with search, filter, map integration, and agent dashboard. Built with Next.js + Laravel.

title: Ride Sharing Mobile App
description: Cross-platform ride booking app with real-time tracking, payment, and rating system. React Native + Firebase.

title: Restaurant Ordering System
description: Online ordering and table reservation system with kitchen display and analytics. WordPress + custom PHP.

title: Healthcare Appointment App
description: Doctor appointment booking app with patient records, video consultation integration, and SMS reminders. Flutter + Django.

title: Learning Management System
description: Online course platform with video streaming, quiz engine, certificate generation, and student analytics. React + Node.js + MongoDB.

title: Inventory Management Dashboard
description: Real-time inventory tracking with barcode scanning, supplier management, and reporting dashboard. Python Flask + SQLite.
